title: workflow_completed
description: Emitted by BizCity_TwinBrain_Workflow_Pipeline when all nodes have finished (success or partial failure). FE shows a summary chip below the timeline. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1 (2026-06-19).

artifacts_count.description: Number of artifacts accumulated in the pool.

total_ms.description: Wall-clock time from workflow_started to workflow_completed, in ms.

tokens.description: Total LLM tokens consumed across all nodes.

answer_len.description: Character length of the final composed answer.

error.description: Non-empty if pipeline ended in a degraded state (e.g. skill_not_found, pipeline_exception).
